EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when a customer is removed from the Admiral renewal process.
EmailTemplate.name: Renewal Process Removal (Admiral)
EmailTemplate.subject: Renewal Process Removal Confirmation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for getting in touch with Kingsbridge.
Please accept this email as confirmation that we have removed your policy from our renewal process.
Your current policy is due to expire on (add in expiry date).
We’ll send automated emails to make sure you’re aware of your policy expiry date so that you can either renew your policy with us manually or find cover elsewhere to keep your business protected against claims.
Our renewals team may still get in touch with to check whether your circumstances have changed and you would like to renew this policy manually.
If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to get in touch.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
